name: Olive Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the grated cheddar cheese, softened butter, flour, salt, and paprika together until well combined.
2. Roll out the dough to make thin rounds, then press a round around each olive to form a ball.
3. Place the balls in a plastic bag so they do not touch each other; freeze overnight.
4. Remove from the freezer and place on an ungreased pan.
5. Bake for about 12 minutes at 400 degrees F (200 C).
Makes about 20.
